metadata.description: 6L-256H GPT trained on Tiny Shakespeare (char-level, 3 seeds, 500 steps) and WikiText-2 (BPE gpt2, 2 seeds, 500 steps). CWA replaces GELU in FFN blocks.

success_criteria_evaluation.note: BPC/PPL improvement over GELU determines verdict.

training_notes: Steps=500 (K_max=5 for CWA speed). Each eval checkpoint=one schema example.
Shakespeare: 90 examples from 5 acts × 3 seeds × 6 checkpoints.
WikiText-2: 60 examples from 5 acts × 2 seeds × 6 checkpoints.

examples.input: GPT 6L-256H act=gelu dataset=shakespeare seed=42 step=FINAL test_eval
